content.body:
I've added [Amount PR #110](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-amount/pull/110), which adds `usage` and `locale` support to `.convertTo()`. I first started it as a bare-bones thing with a pretty big TODO as Waldemar mentioned its lack in [his review](https://github.com/tc39/proposal-amount/issues/108), but ended up filling it up as I've mostly been in transit esp. today and it passed the time.

I intend to mention this as a Stage 2-ish concern during the plenary presentation.
content.formatted_body:
I've added Amount PR #110, which adds usage and locale support to .convertTo(). I first started it as a bare-bones thing with a pretty big TODO as Waldemar mentioned its lack in his review, but ended up filling it up as I've mostly been in transit esp. today and it passed the time.

I intend to mention this as a Stage 2-ish concern during the plenary presentation.
